governing_law.value: Laws of the Province of Ontario and the federal laws of Canada
governing_law.exact_text: This Agreement shall be governed by laws of the Province of Ontario and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein. The parties hereby attorn to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Province of Ontario.

audit_rights.value: Rogers has the right to inspect and audit Licensor's books and records during regular business hours with prior written notice.
audit_rights.exact_text: During the Term, and for a period of twelve (12) months thereafter, Rogers (and its representatives) shall have the right, upon reasonable prior written notice to Licensor, and during regular business hours, to inspect and/or audit Licensor's books and records to confirm compliance with Licensor's obligations under this Section.

fields.payment_terms: in arrears within thirty (30) days following each calendar month
